an2.190-194:1.1:
1
"Bhikkhus, possessing two qualities, one dwells in suffering. What two? (190) Anger and hostility … (191) Denigration and insolence … (192) Envy and miserliness … (193) Deceitfulness and craftiness … (194) Moral shamelessness and moral recklessness.
Possessing these two qualities, one dwells in suffering."
